'''Dinko''' was the code name of a resistance member on [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]], fighting to overthrow the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
He helped [[Ferus Olin]] aid the resistance group. He was arrested by the Imperials when [[Bog Divinian]] was elected as prime minister of Samaria.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
